meta.description: Agent friction themes for ModMe eval pipeline (feedback-themes pattern)

themes.label: Worktree Discipline
themes.description: Parallel agents editing main checkout, port conflicts, or wrong-folder commits.

themes.label: Plan Adherence
themes.description: Editing plan files, recreating todos, or ignoring attached plan constraints.

themes.label: Orchestrator Reliability
themes.description: Intake/catalogue orchestrator failures, skipped audit tables, dry-run vs live mismatches.

themes.label: Inbox Capture Compliance
themes.description: Architecture decisions or significant research without inbox drop.

themes.label: Retry & Tool Loops
themes.description: Repeated tool failures, blocked shell allowlist loops, hung subagents.

themes.label: Human Override
themes.description: Explicit user corrections, reverts, or gesture-style rejections of agent output.

themes.label: Session Continuity
themes.description: Interrupted sessions missing resume context (where-was-i pattern).

themes.label: Verification Gate
themes.description: Claims of completion without dry-run evidence or grind-until-pass verification.
